metadata.purpose: Parcel-level review layer for attributing current Charlottetown zoning from raster samples before dissolving parcels into final zone multipolygons.

fields.name: fid
fields.description: Primary parcel feature id.

fields.name: parcel_candidate_id
fields.description: Existing parcel candidate id from the source parcel layer.

fields.name: source_map
fields.description: Existing parcel source map label.

fields.name: parcel_area_m2
fields.description: Area of the parcel geometry in EPSG:2954 square metres.

fields.name: draft_zone_code
fields.description: Draft zoning code used only as QA context.

fields.name: draft_zone_name
fields.description: Draft zoning name used only as QA context.

fields.name: draft_match_fraction
fields.source: Intersection area divided by parcel area
fields.description: Share of the parcel covered by the dominant draft zone.

fields.name: map_legend_code_guess
fields.description: Predicted current zoning map legend code before review.

fields.name: zoning_code_guess
fields.description: Predicted current bylaw zoning code; null for pseudo-zone map classes.

fields.name: final_class_code_guess
fields.description: Predicted final dissolve class. Equals zoning code for bylaw zones and map legend code for pseudo-zones.

fields.name: zone_name_guess
fields.description: Predicted zone or pseudo-zone name.

fields.name: sample_count
fields.description: Number of interior raster sample points used for the parcel.

fields.name: matched_sample_count
fields.description: Number of sample points matched to the winning map legend code.

fields.name: sample_match_fraction
fields.description: Matched sample count divided by total usable samples.

fields.name: mean_rgb
fields.description: Mean sampled RGB value as #rrggbb for diagnostics.

fields.name: dominant_rgb
fields.description: Dominant sampled RGB value or colour-cluster centre as #rrggbb.

fields.name: rgb_distance
fields.description: Distance from dominant sampled colour to the matched legend colour, where available.

fields.name: pattern_detected
fields.description: True when samples indicate hatch or pattern variation rather than a solid fill.

fields.name: ambiguous_group
fields.description: Known ambiguity group such as I_OR_P or DMU_OR_MHR.

fields.name: assignment_method
fields.description: Controlled method value describing how the guess was assigned.

fields.name: confidence
fields.description: Controlled confidence value for the current guess.

fields.name: review_status
fields.description: Controlled review status for QGIS review.

fields.name: review_priority
fields.description: Suggested review ordering. Lower values are reviewed first.

fields.name: final_map_legend_code
fields.description: Accepted current zoning map legend code.

fields.name: final_zoning_code
fields.description: Accepted current bylaw zoning code. Null for pseudo-zone map classes.

fields.name: final_class_code
fields.description: Accepted dissolve class. Required before final dissolve.

fields.name: final_zone_name
fields.description: Accepted zone or pseudo-zone name.

fields.name: review_notes
fields.description: Reviewer notes from QGIS.

fields.name: source_pdf
fields.description: Source zoning map PDF path.

fields.name: source_raster
fields.description: Source raster GeoPackage path.

fields.name: created_at
fields.description: Layer creation timestamp.

fields.name: updated_at
fields.description: Last update timestamp for reviewed fields.

fields.name: geom
fields.description: Parcel geometry retained for review and later dissolve.

acceptance_rules: final_class_code must be populated before dissolving parcels into current zoning multipolygons.
final_zoning_code may be null only when final_class_code is NA or U.
draft_zone_code must not overwrite or normalize current zoning codes.
I and P must remain distinct final classes even if raster colour sampling cannot separate them reliably.
DMU and MHR must remain distinct final classes even if raster pattern sampling cannot separate them reliably.
Patterned classes and low sample_match_fraction records should default to needs_review.
